
### adding stages (one way) 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/cpu-to-stages-adding-stages-one-way.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/cpu-to-stages-adding-stages-one-way.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::


### running some instructions 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/cpu-to-stages-running-some-instructions.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/cpu-to-stages-running-some-instructions.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/cpu-to-stages-running-some-instructions.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/pipeline/texfig/cpu-to-stages-running-some-instructions.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/pipeline/texfig/cpu-to-stages-running-some-instructions.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/pipeline/texfig/cpu-to-stages-running-some-instructions.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}


:::


### why registers? 


* example: fetch/decode
* need to store current instruction somewhere … while fetching next one
